overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a green Celtic-patterned cloak exploring a cozy, rustic cottage interior. The character moves from a ground floor living area with bookshelves and fireplace, ascends a wooden staircase to an attic bedroom with thatched roofing, then returns to the main floor. The environment features warm lighting, wooden beams, and detailed period furnishings.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cottage living room with kitchenette

events.description: character turns from bookshelf area toward the kitchen corner
character turns away from kitchen and walks toward the entry hall

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the cottage ground floor, examining the living room with tall bookshelves and fireplace, then moving to inspect the kitchen area

entered.detail: large wooden bookcase filled with books reaching to the ceiling
stone hearth with wooden mantel and lit fire
upholstered high-back chair with wooden legs
classic green glass desk lamp on wooden side table
wooden shelving unit with pots, jars, and kitchenware

segments.scene_description: The character explores the cozy ground floor of a rustic cottage, moving from a living area with a tall bookshelf and stone fireplace toward a kitchen corner with wooden shelves and wicker baskets. Warm firelight and natural light from windows illuminate the wooden floor and patterned rugs.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase leading to attic bedroom

events.description: character moves from open living area into the narrow stairwell
character begins ascending the wooden staircase

agents.ego_description: walking toward the wooden staircase and climbing up to the attic level, passing a coat rack and wall mirror

entered.detail: steep wooden stairs with simple railings leading upward
wooden stand with hanging cloaks and garments
rectangular mirror with wooden frame mounted on wall
decorative terracotta vase on wooden table at stair landing

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the living area to a narrow stairwell, passing a coat rack and wall mirror before ascending the wooden stairs. The lighting becomes dimmer as the character climbs toward the attic, with thatched roofing becoming visible at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy attic bedroom with thatched roof and dormer windows

events.description: character enters the attic bedroom from the staircase
character approaches the dormer window and pauses to look outside
character turns and walks to the opposite side of the attic

agents.ego_description: entering the attic bedroom, examining the furnishings, looking out the dormer windows at the countryside, and inspecting the writing desk

entered.detail: simple wooden bed frame with white linens and pillow
low wooden chest of drawers with decorative items on top
oval framed painting hanging on wall above dresser
multi-paned window with blue curtains set into sloped roof
small wooden table with papers and candle holder
exposed straw thatching between wooden support beams

segments.scene_description: The character explores a charming attic bedroom with sloped thatched walls and exposed wooden beams. Sunlight streams through dormer windows as the character examines the bed, dresser, and writing desk, pausing to look out at the green landscape visible through the windows.

events.description: character turns away from attic window and begins descending the stairs
character returns to the ground floor entry area

agents.ego_description: walking back down the wooden stairs from the attic and returning to the main floor entryway near the coat rack and front door

entered.detail: wooden stairs descending from attic level
wooden stand with hanging garments near the door
rectangular framed mirror on the wall
heavy wooden front door with iron hardware

segments.scene_description: The character descends the wooden stairs from the attic, returning to the ground floor entryway. The scene shows the coat rack, wall mirror, and front door as the character completes the exploration loop and moves toward the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic cottage that transitions from a warm ground floor to a sunlit attic before returning to the entryway. It begins in a cozy living area illuminated by firelight and natural light, gliding past a stone fireplace and bookshelves toward a kitchen corner filled with wicker baskets. As the character moves toward a narrow stairwell, the scene shifts from the open living space to a dimmer ascent past a wall mirror and coat rack, eventually reaching the upper level. The environment then opens into a charming attic bedroom where sunlight streams through dormer windows across exposed wooden beams and a writing desk, offering a brief glimpse of the green landscape outside. Finally, the camera descends the wooden stairs, retracing its path through the stairwell to return to the ground floor entryway and the front door.
